channel.title: Uhhh the webcomic thingy
channel.description: The uhhh, the the comic, the web comic...

item.title: Page 71 The [S] Enter Code flash is up!!!!!
item.description:
Huge refactoring of the website structure so it now no longer has a ton of html files and instead dynamically loads page data from one central page. Also I switched to using a thousands url format instead of hundreds because if I ever manage to get this comic done then there will be at least 1 thousand pages.
Also page 71!!!!!!!!!!! The semi-long awaited flash.

item.title: Page 73 yeyyy
item.description: Yeah, new character, another introduction. Les goooo.

item.title: Page 74 yuoyyy
item.description: Yeah, old window, same introduction. Les goooo.

item.title: Page 75 YEAHGAHGHAHSHGAhHHHH!!!
item.description: We're still doing this, but there's a map now.

item.title: Page 76
item.description: I need to speed up production if I want to finish this story within my lifetime. That's an exaggeration, but still, I can't take forever on this story.

item.title: Page 77
item.description: I actually probably wont make a new feed item for every single time I make a new page, it's not like anyone's reading this anyways. I guess I'll only do notable pages.

item.title: Pages 78 - 80
item.description: You've arrived at the site, also a (kinda) timelapse flash
